CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Adva.name: CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Advancing_front_mesher
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Adva.brief: Surface mesher for scale space reconstruction based on CGAL::Advancing_front_surface_reconstruction .
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Adva.detailed: This class applies the advancing front reconstruction algorithm with the possibility of using an upper bound on the length of the produced facets. Is model of CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Mesher Geom_traits geometric traits class. It must be a model of DelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It must have a RealEmbeddable field number type. Generally, Exact_predicates_inexact_constructions_kernel is preferred.

members.name: Point
members.brief: defines the point type.

members.name: Advancing_front_mesher
members.brief: Constructs and advancing front mesher.
members.detailed: maximum_facet_length upper bound on the length of the facets. radius_ratio_bound candidates incident to surface triangles which are not in the beta-wedge are discarded, if the ratio of their radius and the radius of the surface triangle is larger than radius_ratio_bound . Described in Section AFSR_Boundaries beta half the angle of the wedge in which only the radius of triangles counts for the plausibility of candidates. Described in Section AFSR_Selection

CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Alph.name: CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Alpha_shape_mesher
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Alph.brief: Surface mesher for scale space reconstruction based on CGAL::Alpha_shape_3 .
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Alph.detailed: The surface can be constructed either for a fixed neighborhood radius, or for a dynamic radius. When constructing the surface for exactly one neighborhood radius, it is faster to set FixedSurface to Tag_true . If the correct neighborhood radius should be changed or estimated multiple times, it is faster to set FixedSurface to Tag_false . It is undefined whether a surface with fixed radius may have its radius changed, but if so, this will likely require more computation time than changing the radius of a dynamic surface. In either case, it is possible to change the point set while maintaining the same radius. The surface can be stored either as an unordered collection of triangles, or as a collection ordered by shells. A shell is a maximally connected component of the surface where connected facets are locally oriented towards the same side of the surface. Is model of CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Mesher Geom_traits is the geometric traits class. It must be a model of DelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It must have a RealEmbeddable field number type. Generally, Exact_predicates_inexact_constructions_kernel is preferred. FixedSurface determines whether the surface is expected to be constructed for a fixed neighborhood radius. It must be a Boolean_tag type. The default value is Tag_true . Note that the value of this parameter does not change the result but only has an impact on the run-time.

members.name: Alpha_shape_mesher
members.brief: Constructs an alpha shape mesher.
members.detailed: squared_radius $\alpha$ parameter of the alpha shape algorithm. separate_shells determines whether to collect the surface per shell. force_manifold determines if the surface is forced to be 2-manifold. border_angle sets the maximal angle between two facets such that the edge is seen as a border. If the output is forced to be 2-manifold, some almost flat volume bubbles are detected. To do so, border edges must be estimated. An edge adjacent to 2 regular facets is considered as a border if it is also adjacent to a singular facet or if the angle between the two regular facets is lower than this parameter (set to 45° by default). border_angle is not used if force_manifold is set to false.
members.argsstring: (FT squared_radius, bool separate_shells=false, bool force_manifold=false, FT border_angle=45.)

CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Jet_.name: CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Jet_smoother
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Jet_.brief: Smoother for scale space reconstruction based on CGAL::jet_smooth_point_set() .
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Jet_.detailed: Is model of CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoother Geom_traits geometric traits class. It must be a model of DelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It must have a RealEmbeddable field number type. Generally, Exact_predicates_inexact_constructions_kernel is preferred. ConcurrencyTag indicates whether to use concurrent processing. It can be omitted: if thirdpartyTBB is available and CGAL_LINKED_WITH_TBB is defined then Parallel_tag is used. Otherwise, Sequential_tag is used.

CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoo.name: CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoother
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoo.brief: Concept describing a smoothing algorithm used to construct the scales of the scale space reconstruction algorithm.
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoo.detailed: A smoother is a functor that can be applied to a range of points. The container is directly modified, points are replaced by their smoothed versions. the functor can be applied several times by the scale space reconstruction algorithm. Has models CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Weighted_PCA_smoother CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Jet_smoother

members.name: operator()
members.detailed: InputIterator iterator over input points. begin iterator over the first input point. end past-the-end iterator over the input points.

CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Weig.name: CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Weighted_PCA_smoother
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Weig.brief: Smoother for scale space reconstruction based on a principal component analysis weighted by the local density of points.
CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Weig.detailed: Is model of CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoother Geom_traits geometric traits class. It must be a model of DelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It must have a RealEmbeddable field number type. Generally, Exact_predicates_inexact_constructions_kernel is preferred. DiagonalizeTraits model of DiagonalizeTraits that determines how to diagonalize a weighted covariance matrix to approximate a weighted point set. It can be omitted if Eigen 3 (or greater) is available and CGAL_EIGEN3_ENABLED is defined: in that case, an overload using Eigen_diagonalize_traits is provided. ConcurrencyTag indicates whether to use concurrent processing. It can be omitted: if thirdpartyTBB is available and CGAL_LINKED_WITH_TBB is defined then Parallel_tag is used. Otherwise, Sequential_tag is used.

CGAL::Scale_space_surface_reconstruction.name: CGAL::Scale_space_surface_reconstruction_3
CGAL::Scale_space_surface_reconstruction.brief: computes a triangulated surface mesh interpolating a point set.
CGAL::Scale_space_surface_reconstruction.detailed: Scale space reconstruction consists in combining a smoothing algorithm (see Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoother ) that is used to generate a user-specified number of scales with a meshing algorithm (see Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Mesher ). The class stores the point set at the current scale and the reconstructed surface. User can either use the reconstructed surface at the current scale (smoothed version) or propagate the connectivity of the facets back to the original point set. This latest option makes it possible to reconstruct an interpolative surface on a noisy point set. Geom_traits is the geometric traits class. It must be a model of DelaunayTriangulationTraits_3 . It must have a RealEmbeddable field number type. Generally, Exact_predicates_inexact_constructions_kernel is preferred.

members.name: Scale_space_surface_reconstruction_3
members.brief: Empty constructor.

members.name: Scale_space_surface_reconstruction_3
members.brief: Constructs a reconstruction object with the given point range.
members.detailed: This constructor is equivalent to constructing an empty object and then calling insert(begin, end) . InputIterator is an iterator over the point collection. The value type of the iterator must be a Point . begin is an iterator to the first point of the collection. end is a past-the-end iterator for the point collection.

members.name: insert
members.brief: inserts a point into the scale-space at the current scale.
members.detailed: p is the point to insert. Inserting the point does not automatically construct or update the surface. In order to construct the surface, call # reconstruct_surface() . insert(InputIterator begin, InputIterator end) .

members.name: insert
members.brief: inserts a collection of points into the scale-space at the current scale.
members.detailed: InputIterator is an iterator over the point collection. The value type of the iterator must be a Point . begin is an iterator to the first point of the collection. end is a past-the-end iterator for the point collection. Inserting the points does not automatically construct or update the surface. In order to construct the surface, call reconstruct_surface() after inserting the points. insert (const Point & p) .

members.name: increase_scale
members.brief: increases the scale by a number of iterations.
members.detailed: Each iteration the scale is increased, the points set at a higher scale is computed. At a higher scale, the points set is smoother. If no smoothing algorithm is specified, the default Weighted_PCA_smoother is used. Smoother model of Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoother . iterations is the number of iterations to perform. If iterations is 0, nothing happens. smoother the smoother object. This method processes the point set at the current scale. The points can be set with insert(begin, end) . If the surface was already constructed, increasing the scale will not automatically adjust the surface. reconstruct_surface() .

members.name: reconstruct_surface
members.brief: constructs a triangle mesh from the point set at a fixed scale.
members.detailed: The order of the points at the current scale is the same as the order at the original scale, meaning that the surface can interpolate the point set at the original scale by applying the indices of the surface triangles to the original point set. After construction, the facets of the surface can be iterated using facets_begin() and facets_end() . If no meshing algorithm is specified, the default Alpha_shape_mesher is used. Mesher model of Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Mesher . mesher the mesher object. This method processes the point set at the current scale. The points can be set with insert(begin, end) . increase_scale() .

PkgScaleSpaceReconstruction3Ref.name: PkgScaleSpaceReconstruction3Ref
PkgScaleSpaceReconstruction3Ref.detailed: Thijs van Lankveld This method allows to reconstruct a surface that interpolates a set of 3D points using either an alpha shape or the advancing front surface reconstruction method. The output interpolates the point set (as opposed to approximating the point set). How the surface connects the points depends on a scale variable, which can be estimated semi-automatically. Introduced in: CGAL 4.6 BibTeX: cgal:ssr3-26a License: GPL Depends on: PkgAlphaShapes3, PkgSpatialSearchingD, PkgSolverInterface Classified Reference Pages Concepts CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Smoother CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Mesher Main Class CGAL::Scale_space_surface_reconstruction_3 <Geom_traits> Smoothers CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Weighted_PCA_smoother <Geom_traits, DiagonalizeTraits, ConcurrencyTag> CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Jet_smoother <Geom_traits, ConcurrencyTag> Meshers CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Alpha_shape_mesher <Geom_traits, FixedSurface> CGAL::Scale_space_reconstruction_3::Advancing_front_mesher <Geom_traits>
